mapper.sql: id, route_id, line_id AS section_id, route_code, ledger_code AS unit_code, ledger_name, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json, ST_AsGeoJSON(center_point) AS center_point_geo_json, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM road_section_ledger WHERE ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC, lane_no ASC
SELECT FROM road_section_ledger WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
SELECT FROM road_section_ledger WHERE AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_code ASC, start_stake ASC, lane_no ASC

SELECT id AS unit_id, ledger_code AS unit_code, route_code, direction, start_stake, end_stake, ST_AsGeoJSON(center_point) AS center_point_geo_json, ST_AsGeoJSON(geom) AS geom_geo_json FROM road_section_ledger WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND route_code=#{q.routeCode} AND (direction=#{q.direction} OR direction='BOTH') AND start_stake <= #{q.stake} AND end_stake >= #{q.stake} AND deleted=false ORDER BY CASE WHEN direction=#{q.direction} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, start_stake ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO road_section_ledger(id, tenant_id, route_id, line_id, route_code, ledger_code, ledger_name, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, geom, center_point, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{routeId}, #{sectionId}, #{routeCode}, #{unitCode}, #{ledgerName}, #{direction}, #{laneNo}, #{startStake}, #{endStake}, #{lengthM}, #{pavementType}, #{technicalGrade}, #{roadWidth}, #{adcode}, #{manageOrgId}, #{projectId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326)NULL, ST_GeomFromText(#{centerPointWkt}, 4326)ST_PointOnSurface(ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326))NULL, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: UPDATE road_section_ledger SET route_id=#{routeId}, line_id=#{sectionId}, route_code=#{routeCode}, ledger_code=#{unitCode}, ledger_name=#{ledgerName}, direction=#{direction}, lane_no=#{laneNo}, start_stake=#{startStake}, end_stake=#{endStake}, length_m=#{lengthM}, pavement_type=#{pavementType}, technical_grade=#{technicalGrade}, road_width=#{roadWidth}, adcode=#{adcode}, manage_org_id=#{manageOrgId}, project_id=#{projectId}, updated_by=#{updatedBy}, updated_at=now() , geom=ST_GeomFromText(#{geomWkt}, 4326) , center_point=ST_GeomFromText(#{centerPointWkt}, 4326) WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=false
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM road_section_ledger WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND ledger_code=#{unitCode} AND deleted=false LIMIT 1
SELECT ledger_code AS unitCode, id FROM road_section_ledger WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted=false AND ledger_code IN #{c}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO road_section_ledger(id, tenant_id, route_id, line_id, route_code, ledger_code, ledger_name, direction, lane_no, start_stake, end_stake, length_m, pavement_type, technical_grade, road_width, adcode, manage_org_id, project_id, geom, center_point, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{e.id}, #{tenantId}, #{e.routeId}, #{e.sectionId}, #{e.routeCode}, #{e.unitCode}, #{e.ledgerName}, #{e.direction}, #{e.laneNo}, #{e.startStake}, #{e.endStake}, #{e.lengthM}, #{e.pavementType}, #{e.technicalGrade}, #{e.roadWidth}, #{e.adcode}, #{e.manageOrgId}, #{e.projectId}, ST_GeomFromText(#{e.geomWkt}, 4326)NULL,
ST_GeomFromText(#{e.centerPointWkt}, 4326) ST_PointOnSurface(ST_GeomFromText(#{e.geomWkt}, 4326)) NULL , #{userId}, #{userId}, now(), now(), false)
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, ledger_code) DO UPDATE SET route_id = EXCLUDED.route_id, line_id = EXCLUDED.line_id, route_code = EXCLUDED.route_code, ledger_name = EXCLUDED.ledger_name, direction = EXCLUDED.direction, lane_no = EXCLUDED.lane_no, start_stake = EXCLUDED.start_stake, end_stake = EXCLUDED.end_stake, length_m = EXCLUDED.length_m, pavement_type = EXCLUDED.pavement_type, technical_grade = EXCLUDED.technical_grade, road_width = EXCLUDED.road_width, adcode = EXCLUDED.adcode, manage_org_id = EXCLUDED.manage_org_id, project_id = EXCLUDED.project_id, geom = EXCLUDED.geom, center_point = EXCLUDED.center_point, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at = now(), deleted = false
